item.description: 2021 Renaissance Gallery, Melbourne, AU. 2020 K4 Galleri, Oslo, NO. 2019 Galleri Lyssky, Brutus, Oslo, NO. MFA utstilling, “plural plur”, Kunstnernes Hus, NO. NRK Høstutstillingen, Oslo, NO Østlandsutstillingen, NO. 2018 Tre metri per quattro, Curatola/Consolandi, Venice, IT. Post Summer Paintings (with Mikael Jacobsson) Galleri Rosenhøy, Oslo, NO Traffic - Festival delle anime gentili, San Lorenzo in Campo, IT Magnus Myrtveit at Second Space Projects, Melbourne, AU.

Currently: I’m painting works inspired by early russian suprematism and cubism and working on deconstructing the stylistic and visual tropes of said movement. Some of these are up on my instagram page. I’m exploring the world of NFTs and the relationship of non-physical “art"-art and classical art forms like sculpture and painting. It’s more philosophy than theory. I’m recording a tape for Frøya Records. https://froyarecords.bandcamp.com/ It’s recorded with an eurorack/modular synthesizer and it is, in some sense, a covid-19 gesamtkunstwerk.
